session_start.description: Load rules.md, detect active sprint, show session summary

pre_phase.description: Validate state before starting a new phase (rules loaded, sprint file exists)

post_edit_scan.description: Scan edited files for console.log, debugger, secrets, TODOs

pre_commit.description: Run quality gates (lint, typecheck, tests) before committing

test_failure.description: On test failure, trigger structured debug protocol

task_complete.description: Run BLOCKER/WARNING/SUGGESTION checklist after each task

drift_check.description: Check if current work drifts from the active sprint task

rule_check.description: Verify learned rules are not being violated

learn_capture.description: Capture corrections and patterns as rule proposals

session_end.description: Save re-entry prompts, session stats, and pending learnings
